label: Writs
title: Writs (Arts 32 & 226)
note: Supreme Court (Art 32) and High Courts (Art 226) may issue writs for enforcement of rights (and, for High Courts, other purposes).

head: Writ
Meaning
What it does
Lies against
rows: Tests legality of detention; orders release if unlawful
Orders a public authority to perform a legal duty
Stops a lower court/tribunal from exceeding jurisdiction
Quashes an order made without/beyond jurisdiction or in error of law
Challenges a person's claim to a public office
